java::lang::ClassNotFoundException Class Reference

Inheritance diagram for java::lang::ClassNotFoundException:

Public Member Functions

 ClassNotFoundException ()
 ClassNotFoundException (String s)

Detailed Description

Thrown when a class is requested by reflection, but the class definition cannot be found. This exception is often chained from another Throwable.

Author:
Brian Jones
Eric Blake (ebb9@email.byu.edu)
See also:
Class::forName(String)
ClassLoader::findSystemClass(String)
ClassLoader::loadClass(String, boolean)

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

java::lang::ClassNotFoundException::ClassNotFoundException (  )  [inline]

Create an exception without a message. Note that this initializes the cause to null.

Definition at line 56 of file ClassNotFoundException.java.

java::lang::ClassNotFoundException::ClassNotFoundException ( String  s  )  [inline]

Create an exception with a message. Note that this initializes the cause to null.

Parameters:
s the message
